zh.lifeSummary: 當Anna Ingegred Olofsdotter av Sverige Grand Princess of Kyiv於1001年4月8日出生在瑞典斯托可霍爾姆希圖納時，她的父親Olof Skötungung King of Sweden21歲，母親Estrid of  Obotrites23歲。她於1019年與Yaroslav Volodymyrovich "The Wise" Grand Prince of Kyiv and Novgorod在瑞典烏普薩拉烏普薩拉結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1050年2月10日在烏克蘭КиївКиїв Україна Храм享年48歲，埋葬在Российская империяКиевская губернияКиевский уездКиїв。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anna Ingegred Olofsdotter av Sverige Grand Princess of Kyiv于1001年4月8日出生在瑞典斯托可霍爾姆希圖納时，她的父亲Olof Skötungung King of Sweden21岁，母亲Estrid of  Obotrites23岁。她于1019年与Yaroslav Volodymyrovich "The Wise" Grand Prince of Kyiv and Novgorod在瑞典烏普薩拉烏普薩拉结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1050年2月10日在乌克兰КиївКиїв Україна Храм享年48岁，埋葬在Российская империяКиевская губернияКиевский уездКиїв。

nameMeanings.name: av
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Long, Minh, Muoi, Phan, Phat, Vinh, Cuong, Hien, Hoa, Lam, Lan.  Chinese Wing, Chi, Kin, Cheuk, Chi Wai, Chuen, Hon, Keung, Wah, Wai, Chiu, Ho.
Chinese: alternative Mandarin form of the surname 敖, see   Ao  .
Chinese: Cantonese form of the surnames 歐 and 區, see   Ou   1 and 2.

variants.name: Auerbach
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Hyman, Moshe, Emanuel, Isidor, Bronia, Chaim, Faigy, Menachem, Meyer, Yechezkel.
German: habitational name from any of several places in southern Germany and Austria called Auerbach ‘the stream at the water meadow’. See also 2,   Au  , and   Bach  .
Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name from the town of Auerbach in the Upper Palatinate, Bavaria. Compare   Averbach  .

variants.name: Ao
meanings: Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 敖, meaning both ‘rambling’ and ‘deposed king without posthumous titles’ in ancient Chinese: (i) from the personal name of Tai Ao (太敖), teacher of the legendary king Zhuanxu (traditional dates: 2514–2437 BC ). (ii) it is said that the surname is also borne by descendants of deposed kings of the former state of Chu, with no posthumous titles, during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476 BC ).

variants.name: Auer
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Alois, Hans, Erwin, Matthias, Siegfried, Bernd, Bernhard, Erna, Franz, Fritz, Hermann, Horst.

German (mainly Bavaria): topographic name for someone living by a water meadow, German Au, or a habitational name for someone from a place called Au or Aue (see Au and Aue ). This surname is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine), Czechia, and Slovenia.

nameMeanings.name: Anna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

variants.name: Anne
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

nameMeanings.name: Ingegred
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old Norse personal name from the name of the fertility god Ing + garðr ‘enclosure, stronghold’.

variants.name: Ingegärd
meanings: From an Old Norse personal name from the name of the fertility god Ing + garðr ‘enclosure, stronghold’.

historicEvents.title: Christianity Becomes Official Religion of Sweden
historicEvents.description: King Olof Skotkonung converts to Christianity and makes it the official religion of Sweden. Skotkonungj was baptized by the missionary Sigrid in Husaby in Vastergotland. Skotkonung was the first Swedish king to remain Christian throughout his reign.
Prince Vladimir's death leads Rurik princes into fratricidal war that continues until 1036.
Prince Yaroslav (the Wise) of Novgorod assumes throne of Kievan Rus'.
Prince Yaroslav the Wise ends fratricidal war and later codifies laws of Kievan Rus' into Rus'ka pravda (Justice of Rus').

en.lifeSummary: When Anna Ingegred Olofsdotter av Sverige Grand Princess of Kyiv was born on 8 April 1001, in Sigtuna, Stockholm, Sweden, her father, Olof Skötungung King of Sweden, was 21 and her mother, Estrid of  Obotrites, was 23. She married Yaroslav Volodymyrovich "The Wise" Grand Prince of Kyiv and Novgorod in 1019, in Uppsala, Uppsala, Sweden. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 5 daughters. She died on 10 February 1050, in Kyiv Ukraine Temple, Kyiv, Ukraine, at the age of 48, and was buried in Kyiv, Kiev Uyezd, Kiev, Russian Empire.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anna Ingegred Olofsdotter av Sverige Grand Princess of Kyiv est née le 8 avril 1001, à Sigtuna, Stockholm, Suède, son père, Olof Skötungung King of Sweden, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Estrid of  Obotrites, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Yaroslav Volodymyrovich "The Wise" Grand Prince of Kyiv and Novgorod en 1019, à Uppsala, Uppsala, Suède. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée le 10 février 1050, à Kyiv Ukraine Temple, Kyiv, Ukraine, à l’âge de 48 ans, et a été enterrée à Kyiv, Kyyivsʹkyy Povit, Kiev, Empire russe.

de.lifeSummary: Als Anna Ingegred Olofsdotter av Sverige Grand Princess of Kyiv am 8. April 1001 in Sigtuna, Stockholm, Schweden geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Olof Skötungung King of Sweden 21 und ihre Mutter Estrid of  Obotrites 23. Sie hat 1019 in Uppsala, Uppsala, Schweden Yaroslav Volodymyrovich "The Wise" Grand Prince of Kyiv and Novgorod geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb am 10. Februar 1050 im Alter von 48 Jahren in Kyiv Ukraine Temple, Kyiv, Ukraine und wurde in Kiew, Kyyivsʹkyy Povit, Kiev, Russisches Kaiserreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Anna Ingegred Olofsdotter av Sverige Grand Princess of Kyiv è nata il il 8 aprile 1001 nel Sigtuna, Stockholm, Svezia, sua padre, Olof Skötungung King of Sweden, aveva 21 anni e sua madre, Estrid of  Obotrites, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato Yaroslav Volodymyrovich "The Wise" Grand Prince of Kyiv and Novgorod nel 1019, nel Uppsala, Uppsala, Svezia. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 10 febbraio 1050, nel Kyiv Ukraine Temple, Kyiv, Ucraina, all'età di 48 anni, e fu sepolta a Kyiv, Kyyivsʹkyy Povit, Kiev, Russisches Kaiserreich.

ja.lifeSummary: Anna Ingegred Olofsdotter av Sverige Grand Princess of Kyivが1001年4月8日にスウェーデンストックhオルムシグトゥナで生まれた時，父Olof Skötungung King of Swedenは21歳，母Estrid of  Obotritesは23歳であった。1019年にスウェーデンウップサラウップサラでYaroslav Volodymyrovich "The Wise" Grand Prince of Kyiv and Novgorodと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1050年2月10日にウクライナКиївКиїв Україна Храмで48歳で死去し，Российская империяКиевская губернияКиевский уездКиївにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Anna Ingegred Olofsdotter av Sverige Grand Princess of Kyiv(이)가 1001년 4월 8일 스웨덴 스톡홀름 시그툰아에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Olof Skötungung King of Sweden(은)는 21세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Estrid of  Obotrites(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1019년 스웨덴 업프사라 업프사라에서 Yaroslav Volodymyrovich "The Wise" Grand Prince of Kyiv and Novgorod(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1050년 2월 10일 우크라이나 Київ Київ Україна Храм에서 48세의 나이로 사망했으며 Российская империя Киевская губерния Киевский уезд Київ에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anna Ingegred Olofsdotter av Sverige Grand Princess of Kyiv nasceu em 8 de abril de 1001, em Sigtuna, Stockholm, Suécia, seu pai, Olof Skötungung King of Sweden, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Estrid of  Obotrites, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com Yaroslav Volodymyrovich "The Wise" Grand Prince of Kyiv and Novgorod em 1019, em Uppsala, Uppsala, Suécia. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 10 de fevereiro de 1050, em Kyiv Ukraine Temple, Kyiv, Ucrânia, com 48 anos, e foi sepultada em Kyiv, Kyyivsʹkyy Povit, Kiev, Russisches Kaiserreich.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anna Ingegred Olofsdotter av Sverige Grand Princess of Kyiv родилась 8 апреля 1001 г. в местности сигтуна, стоккхолм, Швеция, её отцу по имени Olof Skötungung King of Sweden было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Estrid of  Obotrites, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Yaroslav Volodymyrovich "The Wise" Grand Prince of Kyiv and Novgorod в 1019 г. в местности уппсала, уппсала, Швеция. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Она умерла 10 февраля 1050 г. в местности Киев Украина Храм, Киев, Украина в возрасте 48 лет и была похоронена в местности Киев, Киевский уезд, Киевская губерния, Российская империя.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Anna Ingegred Olofsdotter av Sverige Grand Princess of Kyiv nació el 8 de abril de 1001, en Sigtuna, Stockholm, Suecia, su papá, Olof Skötungung King of Sweden, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Estrid of  Obotrites, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Yaroslav Volodymyrovich "The Wise" Grand Prince of Kyiv and Novgorod en 1019, en Uppsala, Uppsala, Suecia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 10 de febrero de 1050, en Kyiv Ukraine Temple, Kyiv, Ucrania, a la edad de 48 años, y fue sepultada en Kyiv, Kyyivsʹkyy Povit, Kiev, Russisches Kaiserreich.
